title: fragaria × rosea
intro: Fragaria × rosea, also known as beach strawberry, is a hybrid plant species that results from the cross between the Fragaria chiloensis and Fragaria moschata, two species of strawberry plants. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Fragaria × rosea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
